events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: A true rock icon celebrates today! Brian May, the guitar wizard behind Queen, is 79. What's your favourite Queen riff or solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! The one and only Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your ultimate Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV celebrates 45 years
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched 45 years ago today in 1981, forever changing the music landscape, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first video ever played on MTV? 45 years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' kicked off a revolution. How much did MTV change your music world?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, which celebrates its 32nd anniversary today.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' – an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from their debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened 57 years ago today in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Remembering Elvis, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost The King. Elvis Presley's legacy lives on. What's the one Elvis song that always gets you?

events.title: Tupac Shakur: 30 years since his death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost a giant. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his incredible impact on hip-hop and beyond.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix left us, but his incredible guitar work still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in 1969, which celebrates its 57th anniversary today.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still rocking. What's your favourite track from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Rock 'n' roll star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from him?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine', released in 1975 (as per prompt), celebrates its 51st anniversary today.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates today. What does it mean to you?

events.title: The original iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple released its groundbreaking first-generation iPod in 2001, which celebrates its 25th anniversary today.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever with the first iPod. Did you get one of the originals? What was on your playlist?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day. Which Bond theme song is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today, the legendary John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: A very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', released in 1968, celebrates its 58th anniversary today.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles gave us the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A double album packed with classics. Which track stands out for you?
